tool.name: BellaVista Interactive

param.name: selected_genes
param.label: Comma separated list of custom genes

param.name: z_plane
param.label: z-plane of image to be visualize

param.name: transcript_point_size
param.label: Size of the points representing individual transcripts

tool.command: export BELLAVISTA_DIR=`pwd`/input/ && #if $bellavista_conditional.tar_input == "Yes": tar -xzf '$bellavista_conditional.bellavista_tar' && chmod -R 777 'input/' && cp './input/config_orig.json' './input/config.json' && #else if $bellavista_conditional.tar_input == "No": mkdir 'input' 'input/BellaVista_output' && chmod -R 777 'input/' && #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.plot_transcripts == "true": ln -s '$bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.transcript_filename' './input/${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.transcript_filename.element_identifier}.${technology_conditional.plot_genes.transcript_filename.ext}' && #end if #for $image in $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.images: ln -s '$image' 'input/${image.element_identifier}.${image.ext}' && #end for ln -s '$bellavista_config_file' './input/config.json' && #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.plot_cell_seg == "true": ln -s '$bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.cell_segmentation' './input/${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.cell_segmentation.element_identifier}.${technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.cell_segmentation.ext}' && #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.plot_nuclear_seg == "true": ln -s '$bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.nuclear_segmentation' './input/${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.nuclear_segmentation.element_identifier}.${technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.nuclear_segmentation.ext}' && #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.technology == "MERSCOPE": ln -s '$bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.um_to_px_transform' './input/micron_to_mosaic_pixel_transform.csv' && #end if #end if cat ./input/config.json && /init

configfiles.configfile:
#if $bellavista_conditional.tar_input == "No": { "system": "$technology", "data_folder": "./", "create_bellavista_inputs": true,
"visualization_parameters": { "plot_image": true, #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.plot_transcripts == "true": "plot_transcripts": true, #else "plot_transcripts": false, #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.plot_cell_seg == "true": "plot_cell_seg": true, #else "plot_cell_seg": false, #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.plot_nuclear_seg == "true": "plot_nuclear_seg": true, #else "plot_nuclear_seg": false, #end if "genes_visible_on_startup": false, #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.plot_all_genes.all_genes == "Yes": "plot_allgenes": true, #else "plot_allgenes": false, #set $gene_list = ['"' + str(x.strip()) + '"' for x in str($bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.plot_all_genes.selected_genes).split(',')] #set $genes = ','.join($gene_list) "selected_genes": $genes, #end if "rotate_angle": $rotate_angle, "transcript_point_size": $transcript_point_size },
"input_files": { #set $last_index = len($bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.images) - 1 "images": [ #for $i in range(len($images)): "$images[$i].element_identifier.$images[$i].ext"#if $i != $last_index#,#end if #end for ], #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.plot_cell_seg == "true": "cell_segmentation": "${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.cell_segmentation.element_identifier}.${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_cell_segmentation.cell_segmentation.ext}", #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.plot_nuclear_seg == "true": "nuclear_segmentation": "${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.nuclear_segmentation.element_identifier}.${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_nuclear_segmentation.nuclear_segmentation.ext}", #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.technology == "MERSCOPE": "um_to_px_transform": "micron_to_mosaic_pixel_transform.csv", #end if #if $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.plot_transcripts == "true": "transcript_filename": "${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.transcript_filename.element_identifier}.${bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.plot_genes.transcript_filename.ext}", #end if "z_plane": $bellavista_conditional.technology_conditional.z_plane } } #end if

param.name: tar_input
param.label: Data prepared with bellavista_prepare tool?
param.help: For large datasets, it is recommended to use the bellavista_prepare tool to prepare the data.

tool.help:
BellaVista is an open-source visualization tool for imaging-based spatial transcriptomics data. It allows users to visualize and explore spatial transcriptomics data in a user-friendly interface. The tool supports MERSCOPE and Xenium imaging-based spatial transcriptomics technologies.
Users can customize the visualization by selecting specific genes, adjusting image rotation angles, and controlling the size of transcript points. BellaVista also provides options for plotting cell and nuclear segmentation, enhancing the exploration of spatial transcriptomics data.
.. class:: infomark
**Note:** For large datasets, it is highly recommended to use the bellavista_prepare_ tool to prepare the data for visualization. This tool optimizes the data format and structure, ensuring efficient loading and rendering in BellaVista.
.. image:: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pkosurilab/BellaVista/c8129bb8954c92962a87606595c09b35cc414295/images/bellavista_figure.png :height: 500 :width: 700
.. _bellavista_prepare: https://usegalaxy.eu/?tool_id=toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu%2Frepos%2Fiuc%2Fbellavista_prepare%2Fbellavista_prepare%2F0.0.2%2Bgalaxy2&version=latest
